entities.name: SPODOPTERA LITURA
entities.description: A lepidopteran pest whose developmental thresholds and thermal requirements were studied.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The host plant on whose leaves Spodoptera litura was fed.

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL THRESHOLDS
entities.description: The minimum temperature required for the development of different stages of Spodoptera litura.

entities.name: THERMAL REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The total heat accumulation needed for the development of Spodoptera litura stages.

entities.name: LABORATORY CONDITIONS
entities.description: Constant controlled environment used to determine developmental parameters.

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Natural environment used to determine developmental parameters.

entities.name: DEGREE-DAYS
entities.description: A unit of measurement for thermal accumulation used to quantify thermal requirements.

entities.name: OVIPOSITION TO EGG HATCH
entities.description: The developmental period from egg laying to hatching in Spodoptera litura.

entities.name: LARVAL PERIOD
entities.description: The developmental stage of Spodoptera litura as a larva.

entities.name: PUPAL STAGE
entities.description: The developmental stage of Spodoptera litura as a pupa.

entities.name: EMERGENCE TO OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The developmental period from adult emergence to egg laying in Spodoptera litura.

entities.name: UPPER DEVELOPMENTAL THRESHOLD TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The maximum temperature above which development of Spodoptera litura ceases or becomes lethal.
